transcript: Speaker A: నేను ఇక్కడికి కాఫీ తాగడానికి వచ్చాను. [I came here to drink coffee.] Speaker B: I came here to have coffee. Speaker A: I came here to have coffee. ఈ కాఫీ చాలా వేడిగా ఉంది. [This coffee is very hot.] Speaker B: This coffee is very hot. Speaker A: This coffee is very hot. నాకు ఈ కాఫీ టేస్ట్ చాలా బాగా నచ్చింది. [I really liked the taste of this coffee.] Speaker B: I really like the taste of this coffee. Speaker A: I really like the taste of this coffee. Speaker C: Hey, where did you learn English from? Speaker A: From the AI teacher in the SpeakX app. Speaker C: ఏంటి AI టీచరా? కొంచెం అర్థమయ్యేలా చెప్పు. [What, AI teacher? Explain it so I can understand.] Speaker A: ఇది ఒక AI యాప్. దీంట్లో మీరు AI టీచర్ తో ఇంగ్లీష్ ప్రాక్టీస్ చేయొచ్చు. ఇప్పటి వరల్డ్ లో ఇంగ్లీష్ లేకుండా జాబ్స్ కూడా రావు, రెస్పెక్ట్ కూడా రాదు. కరెక్ట్ కదా? అందుకే నేను డైలీ 10-15 మినిట్స్ SpeakX యాప్ లో AI టీచర్ తో ప్రాక్టీస్ చేస్తాను. కేవలం 10 డేస్ లోనే నా ఇంగ్లీష్ చాలా ఇంప్రూవ్ అయింది. ఇప్పుడు నేను భయం లేకుండా చాలా కాన్ఫిడెంట్ గా ఇంగ్లీష్ మాట్లాడుతున్నాను. పైగా 7 డేస్ ట్రయల్ జస్ట్ 2 రూపీస్. [This is an AI app. In this, you can practice English with an AI teacher. In today's world, without English, you won't get jobs or respect. Correct, right? That's why I practice 10-15 minutes daily with the AI teacher in the SpeakX app. In just 10 days, my English improved a lot. Now I speak English very confidently without fear. Moreover, 7 days trial is just 2 rupees.] Speaker C: నేను కూడా ఇంగ్లీష్ నేర్చుకుందాం అనుకుంటున్నా. కానీ ఇలాంటి కోర్సెస్ ఎక్స్పెన్సివ్ ఉంటాయి కదా? [I also want to learn English. But aren't these courses expensive?] Speaker A: ఇందులో 7 డేస్ ట్రయల్ ఉంది. [There is a 7-day trial in this.] Speaker C: వావ్! అది చాలా బాగుంది. నేను కూడా ఇప్పుడే SpeakX యాప్ డౌన్లోడ్ చేసుకుంటాను. [Wow! That's very good. I will also download the SpeakX app right now.] Speaker D: వెంటనే SpeakX యాప్ డౌన్లోడ్ చేసి AI టీచర్ తో ఇంగ్లీష్ నేర్చుకోండి. జస్ట్ 2 రూపీస్ ట్రయల్ ప్యాక్. [Download the SpeakX app immediately and learn English with the AI teacher. Just 2 rupees trial pack.]
on_screen_text: నేను ఇక్కడికి కాఫీ తాగడానికి వచ్చాను [I came here to drink coffee], I came here to have coffee, ee coffee chala vediga undhi [this coffee is very hot], This coffee is very hot, naku ee coffe taste baga nachindhi [I really liked the taste of this coffee], I really like the taste of this coffee, Hey, where did you learn English from?, From the AI teacher in the SpeakX app, enti AI teacher ah? ardam ayyela cheppu [What, AI teacher? Explain it clearly], cheppu idi oka app. indulo miru daily AI teacher English practice cheyochu [Tell me, this is an app. In this, you can practice English daily with an AI teacher], ippati world lo English lekunda Jobs kuda ravu respect kuda radu. Correct kada [In today's world, without English, you won't get jobs or respect. Correct, right?], anduke nenu daily 10-15 minutes SpeakX lo AI teacher tho practice chesthanu [That's why I practice 10-15 minutes daily with the AI teacher on SpeakX], kevalam 10 days lone na English chala improve ayindi [In just 10 days, my English improved a lot], ippudu nenu bhayam lekunda ippudu confident ga English matladuthunnanu [Now I speak English confidently without fear], paiga 7 days trial just 2 rupees nenu [Moreover, 7 days trial is just 2 rupees], nenu kuda english nerchukundam anukuntunna kani ilanti courses expensive untayi kada? anukunta [I also want to learn English, but aren't these courses expensive? I think], indulo 7 days trial undi [There is a 7-day trial in this], Wow! adi chala bagundi. nenu kuda SpeakX app download chesukuntanu [Wow! That's very good. I will also download the SpeakX app], SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE, GET IT ON Google Play, Download on the App Store
summary: A man demonstrates how he practices English by translating Telugu sentences with an AI teacher on the SpeakX app. A woman asks him about it, expressing concern about high costs, but he reassures her with a 7-day trial offer for just 2 rupees. The ad ends with a call to action to download the SpeakX app.
